---
title: "Checkout rf2"
author: "JW"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Load local package sources for development-time plotting checks.
devtools::load_all("C:/Users/justu/Desktop/damagedata_analyser/R/packages/damageRF")
```

```{r}
# Discover all model artifacts and keep only RF `.rds` files.
all_output_files = list.files("output/rf2/", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
rds_files = all_output_files[endsWith(all_output_files, ".rds")]
rf2_files = rds_files[startsWith(basename(rds_files), "rf_")]
```

```{r}
# Sample a subset of fitted models for quick manual inspection.
all_rf2s = lapply(sample(rf2_files, 5), readRDS)
```

```{r}
# Plot one sampled model result.
i = 1
print(rf2_files[i])
damageRF::plotter(all_rf2s[[i]])
```
